title: How to get over heartbreak FAST

Did he say nice words? Was he loyal? Are you flowers, whatever, like all the good things. And then the bad things. Okay? Then I want you to look at that paper. And if the bad column is way longer than the good one, I want you to fold the paper like this. Okay? Fold the paper. And then I want you to start drying your tears. Okay? Then I want you to go to the bathroom and I want you to take a deep look in the mirror and I want you to ask yourself, why am I crying over losing a problem? Cuz honey, you did not have a partner.
